modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help setting up Net Notice on Listserv

full_description_text: 
The user called in asking how to setup Net Notice. They were trying to get it working on Listserv but ran into issues. It seems like they weren't sure about the steps needed to complete the setup.
short_description: Need help setting up Net Notice on Listserv
description: The user called in asking how to setup Net Notice. They were trying to get it working on Listserv but ran into issues. It seems like they weren't sure about the steps needed to complete the setup.
